question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: Honestly kind of drained. I haven't been sleeping well and I'm behind on things.

assessment.note: They reported being drained and not sleeping well, with being behind on things pointing to a wellbeing hit and some disengagement risk.

new_queue.name: What kind of support would make the next couple of weeks easier for you?

new_queue.name: How has the feedback on your recent work landed for you?

new_queue.name: What do you want to get back to feeling steady on first?
